subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Thy petition hath been read in the presence of the Wronged One and hath attained unto His hearing. Praise be to God for the glances of loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه عریضه ات در ساحت مظلوم قرائت شد و باصغا فائز گشت الحمد لله لحاظ عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @scarcity of receptive souls, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @thankfulness; gratitude
